content.description: The content displayed inside the tooltip.

placement.description: Preferred placement relative to the target. 'auto' picks the best position based on available viewport space.

timeout.description: Milliseconds before the tooltip auto-hides after the mouse leaves the target (0 = immediate).

showTooltip(e, content).description: Show a tooltip anchored to the hovered element. Pass a string, ReactNode, or TooltipOptions object.

hideTooltip({ timeout? }).description: Explicitly hide the tooltip. Defaults to the configured timeout if not specified.
